features: Universal Compatibility - Designed to fit Korbell 16L and most standard litter and nappy bins. Perfect fit and easy to install, ensuring no slipping or tearing during use.
Long-Lasting Value - Includes 3 x 12-metre liners, giving coverage for up to 640 nappies per refill, ideal for busy homes, nurseries, or pet waste disposal.
Leak-Proof & Durable Design - Made with tear-resistant, odor-blocking material to keep your nursery, bathroom, or litter area clean and fresh.
Eco-Conscious & Convenient - Crafted from eco-friendly, strong plastic film, providing reliable performance while reducing waste and environmental impact.
Venture Quality Guarantee - Venture Disposable Hero liners deliver trusted quality, superior strength, and consistent hygiene, making nappy disposal simpler and more hygienic every time.
description: Keep your nursery or home clean and odor-free with Venture Nappy Bin Liners - the perfect fit for Korbell 16L and many more nappy or standard litter bins. Each pack includes three 12-metre rolls, holding up to 640 nappies per refill, providing long-lasting convenience and value. Our tear-resistant, leak-proof design locks in odors and prevents messy leaks, keeping your baby’s changing space or litter area clean and hygienic.
